hero.headline: Hicham Alaoui - EQD Trading Analyst & Data Scientist
hero.subline: Data Scientist focused on applied machine learning, quantitative risk, and production-grade analytics systems.

metrics.label: Real-world domains
metrics.desc: Banking, trading, NGO, and public-sector analytics

metrics.label: End-to-end ML projects
metrics.desc: From EVT risk tooling to CO2 forecasting and trading signals

bullets: Partner with Structuring to design, build, and maintain equity and derivatives index methodologies.
Own monthly and quarterly index rebalancing workflows with external calculation agents.
Lead daily pricing and parameter validation and coordinate fixes with trading and structuring stakeholders.
Automate controls and reporting to improve reliability and operational speed.
Maintain high traceability and documentation for audit readiness and handovers.
Designed a Peaks-over-Threshold EVT engine for dynamic pre-trade limits.
Built Python and SQL pipelines for trading-access logs and bypass events.
Developed Streamlit dashboards for monitoring, backtests, and diagnostics.
Industrialized the stack with Docker and GitHub Actions CI/CD.
Built CO2 emissions prediction models for Swiss agriculture.
Implemented an LSTM-based French article generator for sustainability briefs.
Packaged models into a lightweight Python API for non-technical users.
Cleaned and migrated household survey microdata into PostgreSQL.
Produced ARIMA and ARDL indicators for poverty and labor market analysis.
Automated Power BI dashboards for internal stakeholders.

projects.name: Dynamic Limits - EVT Risk Dashboard
projects.summary: Internal POC for dynamic pre-trade limits calibration using Peaks-over-Threshold EVT and historical trading data.
projects.problem: Static limits failed to adapt to changing volatility and fat-tail risk.
projects.approach: Built POT EVT calibration pipeline with monitoring dashboards and diagnostics.
impact: Fat-tail-aware thresholds for price and size
Interactive limit visualization and exception drill-down

projects.name: XGBoost Trading Signals
projects.summary: Research pipeline for short-horizon equity signal generation with walk-forward validation.
projects.problem: Signals were unstable across regimes and transaction costs reduced net performance.
projects.approach: Engineered features by volatility regime and evaluated with cost-aware walk-forward validation.
impact: Reproducible research pipeline for strategy iteration

projects.name: FarmVision - Crop Stress Detection
projects.summary: Image-based detection of leaf stress and disease for controlled-environment agriculture.
projects.problem: Agriculture teams needed faster and more consistent disease detection.
projects.approach: Fine-tuned transfer learning CNN models on curated plant image data.

projects.name: CO2 Emissions Explorer - Swiss Agriculture
projects.summary: Econometric and ML modeling for agricultural emissions with scenario analysis.
projects.problem: Policy teams needed transparent emissions projections by subsector.
projects.approach: Built reproducible data pipeline and combined econometric + ML forecasting.

education.program: Engineering - Applied Economics, Statistics and Big Data

about.narrative: EQD trading analyst and data scientist trained at INSEA, building EVT-based risk tooling and production analytics systems.
